title: Cross-platform view sharing is now GA
body:
Cross-platform view sharing via Delta Sharing is now generally available. The data access and billing method when sharing views are updated. See [How do I incur and check OpenSharing costs?](/aws/en/opensharing#share-costs).

A new system table allows you to track the shared materialized data history. See [OpenSharing materialization history system table reference](/aws/en/admin/system-tables/materialization).

Account admins can now configure the time-to-live (TTL) of data materialization. See [Configure TTL of data materialization](/aws/en/opensharing/set-up#data-ttl).
